title: feat(processes): deft-cache -- unified content cache and quarantine layer
body:
## Problem
Triage v1 (#845) shipped with a P0 cache-bypass bug. Build a single, content-agnostic cache + quarantine layer that triage v1 (and later #610 wiki-llm) consume rather than reimplement.

## Acceptance criteria
- task cache:put / get / invalidate / fetch-all / prune functional for github-issue source
- quarantine scanner v2 with 3 categories baseline-on
- task triage:* surface rebound onto cache:get

comments.body: Per-source rate-limit awareness on cache:fetch-all is a v1 must-include; without it v1 swarms break on real-sized populate.
